title: dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. rhaetica
intro: Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. rhaetica, also known as Rhaetian Marsh Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid found in the mountainous regions of Europe. It is a type of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. rhaetica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
